name: Native Decompiler
description: Decompile a native binary (ELF/PE/Mach-O) to C-like pseudocode with rizin's built-in Ghidra decompiler (pdg over all functions). Static: analyses and decompiles, never runs the target. Prereq-gated on rizin/r2; honest blind spot with an install hint when absent. Pair with elf/pe/macho-analyze.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install rizin (https://rizin.re); its `pdg` command is a built-in Ghidra decompiler. (r2/radare2 also works.)

safety.notes: Trusted analyzer (rizin) over an untrusted binary — static analysis + decompilation, never execution/emulation. Timeout-bounded; scr.color disabled for clean text.

payload.note: BYO tool on PATH (rizin ships a large native toolchain; not bundled). Uses rizin's built-in Ghidra decompiler (`pdg`) — no separate Ghidra/JVM needed. Dispatcher prereq gate = honest degradation. Complements the *-analyze triage skills.
